title: MardoGaming Chroma
description: PVP-focused texture pack Various tweaks were given to create more flair and personality.
body:
**MardoGaming Chroma**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- PVP-focused texture pack Various tweaks were given to create more flair and personality. **NEW SERVER JUST RELEASED, BOX + HCF + GENS Blessedgen.minehut.gg** [BlessedGen Discord](https://discord.gg/bGaM5RqBfQ) ---
**What the pack looks like** ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I8i3fRfw/images/8bcf2ea4d8ab657776b215f9b2488a6819e2ad9c.png)
--- This texture pack is made for players who want their game to feel a bit flashier without losing that classic Minecraft vibe. It makes a bunch of changes to the default textures—things like items, particles, and other little details—so everything looks cleaner, sharper, and more exciting during gameplay. One of the coolest features of this pack is the custom sword colors that change depending on the knockback level. If your sword has Knockback 1 or Knockback 2, the blade shifts to a different color, so you instantly know what you’re holding without having to hover over it. It adds a ton of personality and makes PvP way more fun. Since this is a PvP-focused pack, a lot of the tweaks are designed to improve visibility and make fights feel smoother. Particles are easier to read, weapons have cleaner outlines, and the overall visuals are adjusted to help you keep track of everything happening around you. It also adds small stylistic touches that give the pack its own unique flair, making fights feel more satisfying and less cluttered. If you want a pack that makes combat look better, feel better, and just straight-up adds more style, this one fits perfectly. have any questions? need help? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!**
